page_metadata.biotools__summary: AutoClassWrapper: a Python wrapper for AutoClass C classification. AutoClass is an unsupervised Bayesian classification system and AutoClass C is its implementation in C made by the NASA. AutoClassWrapper is a Python wrapper to ease the use of Autoclass C.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: AutoClassWrapper: a Python wrapper for AutoClass C classification. AutoClass is an unsupervised Bayesian classification system and AutoClass C is its implementation in C made by the NASA. AutoClassWrapper is a Python wrapper to ease the use of Autoclass C.
